titleStmt.title: SII 38.365: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 365. (A.R. No. 365 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇadeva Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1446, Chitrabānu, Tai śu. 10, Uttiram, Saturday = irregular.

summary.p: This inscription records that the pontiff of Bhīksha-maṭham, Viśvēśvara Śivāchārya, the temple officials (dānamāyēśvarar) and kaikkōḷa-mudaḷigal granted one thousand kuḻi of wet land, five hundred kuḻi of dry land and also a house, at Sōrappūṇḍi, a dēvadāna village of the Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār temple at Dēvakkapuram which was situated to the south of Śeyyāṟu, adjacent to Rājagambīraṉ-malai in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kkōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, as tax free gifts (iṟaiyilikāṇiāṭchi) to Vāḍamalaiyār, one of the scholars (vidwans) of Āṟṟuvāṉpāḍi, son of Tiruvēṅkaṭanāthar. It is also mentioned that this arrangement was caused to be engraved on the kumudhapaḍai. Further the donors undertook the responsibility of remitting all the taxes, like paḻavari, puduvari and other taxes, like (levied on the lands and house).

The pontiff of Bhīksha-maṭham, Viśvēśvara Śivāchārya, the tāṉattār, Karaiēṟaviṭṭār, Chandranambi, kaikkōḷa-mudaḷigal and several others, including the temple accountant Uttaṇḍar figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalecura metiṉi micura kaṇṭakaṭṭāri cāḷuva śrīvirappiṟatāpaśrīkiruṣṇatevamakāyirāyar piṟitivirācciyam
paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 5 10 4 melcellā niṉṟa ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟa koṭṭattu mel kuṉṟa
nāṭṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu yirācakempiraṉmalaikku Aṭutta paṟṟu ceyyāṟṟukku teṉpirivāṉa tevakkāpuram Uṭaiyār tirumalar Uṭaiya nāyiṉār
tirunāmakkāṇi Āṉa corappūṇṭiyil cittirapāṉuvaruṣam tai mātam pūṟuvapakṣattu tecamiyum Uttiramum peṟṟa caṉivārattu nāḷ tevakkāpuram
pikṣāmaṭam vicuvecura civācāriyarum tāṉam māyecurar kaikkoḷa mutalikaḷum Āṟṟuvāṉpāṭi vittuvāṉkaḷil tiruveṅkaṭanātar
makaṉ vaṭamalaiyāṟku yiṟaiili kāṇiāṭci paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi nāṅkaḷ yivaṟku corappūṇṭiyile nañcaiyile māvaṉ
tākkile kuḻi Āyiramum Ēri Etuvāyile puñcaiyile kuḻi Añṉūṟum Oru maṉaiyum nāṅkaḷ yivaṟku Iṟaiyili kāṇiāṭci
Āka kumu(mu)tapaṭaiyile kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom yintamaṉaiyum nilattaiyum nokki kopuravācalile piṟakkum paḻavari putuvari Eppeṟpaṭṭa cakalavakaiyum Uḷpaṭa
yittai nokki vanta kāṇikkai Ellām nāṅkaḷe Uttiram collikkoḷḷakkaṭavom Ākavum yimmatikārikku nañcaiyile kuḻi Āyiramum puñcaiyile kuḻi Aññūṟum
Oru maṉaiyum yiṟaiyili kāṇiāṭci Āka cantiṟātittavaraiyum puttira pavuttira paramparai Āka Aṉupavittuk koḷḷak kaṭavar Ākavum yippaṭi cammatippu vaṭamalaiyāṟku
yiṟaiyili kāṇiāṭci paṇṇikkuṭuttom pikṣāmaṭamvicivecura civācāri Ayyaṉ Eḻuttu tāṉattār karaieṟa viṭṭār Eḻuttu cantira(ā)nampi Eḻuttu
Āḻvār tirumalainayiṉār Eḻuttu māyecurar tirumalaiccivaṉ kaṅkāṇi Āṇṭār Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu kaikkoḷamutaliyaḷ kollāviṭṭar I ṭi nayiṉār
Aṟupattu muvar nāvilaṅkātār Uḷḷiṭṭa kaikkoḷamutaliyaḷ Eḻuttu yippaṭikku yintakkalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku Uttaṇṭar Eḻuttu
yintataṉmattukku yātoruvar Akutam paṇṇinavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭaivarkaḷ Ākavum §
Digital edition of SII 38.365 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
